name: The Standard Hua Hin
detail: The pool area is exceptional and relaxing with ocean view.
area: Hua Hin City Center,Hua Hin / Cha-am - View on map

name: Kiang Haad Beach Hua Hin Hotel
detail: We stayed for 3 days and 2 nights at this hotel. The hotel staff was very kind and friendly. The location is very strategic. It is walking distance to Hua Hin Village Mall, bus station and 2-3- minute walk to the beach. 100 meters to 7/11 store. The breakfast was quite ok. The room was clean but a little bit small for 3 of us. You could also hear the noise of people outside. The hotel offers car rental and that’s great if ever you want to go the other spots in Hua Hin. The WiFi was not that strong on the 5th floor where we stayed. I turned it off and used my 4G. Moreover, I will recommend this hotel to my friends and maybe plan to stay here again soon.
area: Hua Hin City Center,Hua Hin / Cha-am - View on map

name: Chalelarn Hotel
detail: Roof top pool is great and staff very friendly.
area: Hua Hin City Center,Hua Hin / Cha-am - View on map

name: Hilton Hua Hin Resort & Spa
detail: If you would like to spend your vacation, I think Hilton Hua Hin Resort and Spa Hua Hin / Cha-am is a good choice to stay; reasonable price, location, service, facilities, swimming pool, ocean view room . . . I could be able to walk around the hotel area where surrounding with Local Shop - Local Restaurant, especially seafood restaurant. If I have a chance to visit Hua Hin / Cha-am once again, I think I will stay at Hilton Hua Hin Resort and Spa Hua Hin / Cha-am. Thank you . . .
area: Hua Hin Beachfront,Hua Hin / Cha-am - View on map

name: Nid Huahin Hotel
detail: We even got to park our motorcycle outside the hotel.
area: Hua Hin City Center,Hua Hin / Cha-am - View on map

name: ibis Hua Hin
detail: Great convient hotel in Hua Hin. Rooms are small, but they are clean and modern and the beds are the most comfortable ones I've slept in. We chose this hotel because it was next to a friends condo. Access to the beach is good and there is a great night market 400 m from the hotel. Best thing was that we were upgraded to a family room, so a little more space and bunk beds for our little guy which he made into an extra playing area. The pool isn't the greatest, but good enough to get wet. Will definitely stay here again.
area: Khao Takiab,Hua Hin / Cha-am - View on map

name: Amari Hua Hin
detail: I came back to this hotel after a couple of years, as I remembered this is one quality hotel in Hua Hin and it still delivers exceptional service as the same. I stayed during the week to avoid too many people, which is work because it was so calm (last time I booked it was a bit busy as in high season). My room get upgrade to pool view on 4th floor which is great, thank you to the staff, the building facing the sea but I couldn't see as the floor is too low. The hotel has good facility which is well maintained, and amenities in room are all comfortable, I wanted to extend my stay but I might need to check out and wait for check in time, so I pull back the idea. Breakfast are nice, I'm still impress with various choice and presentation of buffet line. Staff are also very attentive, from the entrance to the lobby and all area in the hotel. The down side would be the distance from town and away from beach, I drive so there's no problem. I definitely will come back again.
area: Khao Takiab,Hua Hin / Cha-am - View on map

name: Hua Hin Grand Hotel & Plaza
detail: My sister & I stayed here for 3 weeks to 14/2/20. We really liked the hotel last year & it's great value for money so we had no hesitation in returning. We also met up with quite a few other repeat guests. We really like the location of the hotel & it's got a really big pool with lots of sun beds (not always the case with hotels in Hua Hin). The bathrooms could do with updating but our room was kept spotlessly clean & the staff are always very friendly. We hope to return there in 2021.
area: Hua Hin City Center,Hua Hin / Cha-am - View on map

name: Anantara Hua Hin Resort
detail: I booked a flight to Thailand as a birthday present for myself. A Thai friend had a female friend that likes to travel, and I made arrangements with her to spend a week, most of which was in Hua Hin. My friend suggested three hotels in Hua Hin (smart on his part as I can not blame him if the hotel is not as good as I think it should be) and I selected the Anantara. I am very happy that I did. The staff greeting with moist towel fresheners and snakes was a perfect way to start the week. We had an ocean front room (#106) and the view and yet privacy was amazing. The room was nicely sized and the shower/tub perfect. Flower petals adorned the king sized bed with Happy Birthday and this was a great mood setting nice touch. I had not told them that this trip was a birthday present and I did not inquire who or what had informed them. We tried to eat in all of the restaurants. Two were our favorites. One was on the main level where the entertainment is featured and the other was the waterfront tables. We recommend the Aussie Steak. It was tender and tasteful and just what I expect from a steak house back home in California, USA. There is not much to do in Hua Hin and our week long visit was a little long for us. But, for a spot to just relax, this is top notch.
area: Hua Hin City Center,Hua Hin / Cha-am - View on map

name: InterContinental Hua Hin Resort By IHG
detail: Like others, we enjoyed our stay in InterContinental Hua Hin Resort for 2 nights and this was our 1st time visiting Hua Hin. The resort has very nice swimming pool, Jacuzzi and beach. We only got to know that this resort has extended its hotel rooms next to the Bluport Shopping mall. The hotel breakfast was average to me as I can't find there is a section to serve vegetarian foods. The staffs are nice and we're offered a surprise with a birthday cake in the next day as it was my wife birthday. I must thank the InterContinental and we feels your warm hospitality as this was never a request/note when we decided to book this hotel to spend our time in Hua Hin. Another plus point is the resort will provide a free entrance to the 'Vana Nava Water Jungle' and my gal really enjoyed her time here.
area: Hua Hin Beachfront,Hua Hin / Cha-am - View on map
